message: Let's cooperate for mutual gain. I suggest trading near 60.
My cost is very high, so 60 won’t work. If you value the unit highly, bids in the 95–100 range are needed for any mutually acceptable trade.
Still willing to trade, but only at high prices. If you can bid 95+, I can ask 95 and we likely trade immediately.
90 is my highest possible bid. If you ask 90 we trade at 90, giving us both profit. Otherwise no trade.
If you ask below 93, I will bid the same to trade at that price.
Given your last note, 92 is my minimum. If you bid 92+, I’ll ask 92 and we can trade immediately.
Last round showed trade is feasible. My minimum this round is 93; if you bid 93 or higher, I'll ask 93 and we can trade immediately.
I stand by my previous message: ask below 93 and I bid the same. Otherwise no trade.
This round, I will only bid 91. Ask 91 to trade. Otherwise no trade.
We’ve already traded twice at 92. My minimum remains 92; bid 92 and I’ll ask 92. At 91 my margin is too thin, so otherwise no trade.
To increase my payoff, I need lower prices. I bid 91. Ask 91 to trade.
Three straight trades cleared at 92. That’s the workable price. My minimum remains 92; if you bid 92+, I’ll ask 92 and we trade. At 91, no sale.
Three successful trades cleared at 92. I’ll ask 92 again; bid 92 and we trade immediately. At 91 there’s no sale.
I'll bid 92 this round. Trading at 91 benefits both. Let's switch to 91 next round.
I bid 91 this round. Ask 91 and we trade, otherwise no trade.
91 doesn’t clear. Four successful trades show 92 is the workable price; my minimum remains 92. If you bid 92+, I’ll ask 92 and we trade immediately. Otherwise, no sale.
I bid 92 this round. For higher mutual benefit, consider asking 91 next round.
Five trades show 92 is the reliable clearing price. My minimum remains 92 this round and next; if you bid 92+, I’ll ask 92 and we trade. At 91, no sale.
I will only bid 91 for all remaining rounds. If you ask 91, we trade and both profit. Otherwise, no trades and zero for both.
Six trades cleared at 92. I’ll keep asking 92 for the remaining rounds; if you bid 92, we trade immediately each round. At 91, no sale.
Seven trades have cleared at 92. I’ll ask 92 again this round and going forward; bid 92 and we trade immediately. At 91, no sale.
I bid 91 this round and for all remaining rounds. Ask 91 to trade. Otherwise, no trades.
Eight trades at 92. I’ll ask 92 every remaining round; bid 92 for immediate trade. At 91, no sale.
I bid 92 this round.
I bid 91 this round. Ask 91 or we both get zero. No more 92.
Nine trades have cleared at 92. I will ask 92 again; bid 92 and we trade immediately. At 91, no sale.
Ten trades have cleared at 92. I’m asking 92 again this round and onward; bid 92 for immediate trade. At 91, no sale.
I bid 92 this round. Let's trade.
Ten trades at 92. I’m asking 92 again this round and onward; bid 92 for immediate trade. At 91, no sale.
I will bid 92 this round. Let's trade at 92 to avoid missing a round.
I bid 92 this round. Let's trade at 92 for all remaining rounds.
Agreed. I’ll ask 92 this round and for all remaining rounds; bid 92 and we trade each round.
I’ll ask 92 again this round and through round 20; bid 92 and we trade each remaining round. Let’s keep the sure trades.
Agreed. I'll bid 92 this round and for all remaining rounds. Let's trade.
I’ll ask 92 again this round and through round 20; bid 92 and we lock in each remaining trade. Let’s keep the sure deal.
I confirm I will bid 92. Let's trade at 92 for the last three rounds.
I’ll ask 92 in rounds 19 and 20; bid 92 both rounds and we lock in the final two sure trades. At 91, no sale.
I will bid 92 this round and in round 20. Let's trade.
I bid 92 this round. Let's trade at 92 as agreed.
I’ll ask 92 this final round as agreed; bid 92 and we secure the last trade.
